---
title: "Clean Road Closures"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("data.table", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("data.table")
}
if (!requireNamespace("sf", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("sf")
}
library(data.table)
library(sf)
```

```{r}
# Paths
input_path <- "Datasets/Street_Closures_due_to_Construction_Activities_by_Block_and_Intersection_20260121.csv"
output_path <- "Datasets/Clean/Street_Closures_Construction_Clean.csv"

# Date filter window aligned to complaints data
min_date <- as.IDate("2006-01-01")
max_date <- as.IDate("2024-12-31")

# Columns to keep
keep_cols <- c(
  "OnStreetName", "FromStreetName", "ToStreetName",
  "BoroughName", "WorkStartDate", "WorkEndDate",
  "Purpose", "OFTCode", "WKT"
)

# Load
dt <- fread(input_path)

# Keep relevant columns if present
keep_present <- intersect(keep_cols, names(dt))
dt <- dt[, ..keep_present]

# Drop missing/empty WKT
dt <- dt[!is.na(WKT) & trimws(WKT) != ""]

# Validate WKT geometry (drop invalid)
geom <- tryCatch(st_as_sfc(dt$WKT), error = function(e) NULL)
if (!is.null(geom)) {
  valid_idx <- st_is_valid(geom)
  dt <- dt[valid_idx]
} else {
  warning("WKT could not be parsed; only empty WKT rows were removed.")
}

# Parse dates
parse_idate <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x == ""] <- NA
  fmts <- c(
    "%Y-%m-%d",
    "%m/%d/%Y",
    "%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S",
    "%m/%d/%Y %H:%M",
    "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S",
    "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M",
    "%Y %b %d %I:%M:%S %p",
    "%Y %B %d %I:%M:%S %p"
  )
  out <- as.Date(rep(NA, length(x)))
  for (fmt in fmts) {
    idx <- is.na(out) & !is.na(x)
    if (!any(idx)) break
    parsed <- as.Date(strptime(x[idx], fmt, tz = "America/New_York"))
    out[idx][!is.na(parsed)] <- parsed[!is.na(parsed)]
  }
  as.IDate(out)
}

dt[, WorkStartDate := parse_idate(WorkStartDate)]
dt[, WorkEndDate := parse_idate(WorkEndDate)]

# If end date missing, assume same as start date
dt[is.na(WorkEndDate) & !is.na(WorkStartDate), WorkEndDate := WorkStartDate]

# Filter to date range (keep rows that overlap the window)
dt <- dt[!is.na(WorkStartDate)]
dt <- dt[WorkStartDate <= max_date & WorkEndDate >= min_date]

# Write cleaned dataset
fwrite(dt, output_path)
```
